Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator

Packages that use ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension  

  • Uses of ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Subinterfaces of ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  BigDecimalPrecisionValidator
    Validates the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().
    interface  PrimitiveCharacterValidator
    Validates the requirements of a Comparable value.
    interface  PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a primitive floating-point number.
    interface  PrimitiveIntegerValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a primitive integer number.
    interface  PrimitiveNumberValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a primitive number (e.g.
    interface  SizeValidator
    Validates the requirements of the size of a collection.

  • Uses of ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of BigDecimalPrecisionValidator.
    class  BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorNoOp
    A BigDecimalPrecisionValidator that does nothing.
    class  BigDecimalScaleValidatorImpl
    An implementation of PrimitiveNumberValidator for a BigDecimal's scale.
    class  PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveCharacterValidator.
    class  PrimitiveCharacterValidatorNoOp
    A PrimitiveCharacterValidator that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveDoubleValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator for doubles.
    class  PrimitiveFloatingPointValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveFloatValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator for floats.
    class  PrimitiveIntegerValidatorImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleIntegerValidator.
    class  PrimitiveIntegerValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveIntegerValidator that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveNumberValidatorImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of PrimitiveNumberValidator.
    class  PrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveNumberValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
    class  SizeValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of a SizeValidator.
    class  SizeValidatorNoOp
    A SizeValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.

  • Uses of ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension that implement ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensiblePrimitiveNumberValidator that does nothing.
